ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the position of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Experience of the player in years */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the version belongs to */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player at the time of version creation */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player at the time of version creation */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Experience of the player at the time of version creation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_versions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week the statistic is for */,
  "current" REAL /* Current value of the statistic */,
  "predicted" REAL /* Predicted value of the statistic */,
  "actual" REAL /* Actual value of the statistic */,
  "difference" REAL /* Difference between predicted and actual values */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage difference between predicted and actual values */,
  "stat_type" TEXT /* Type of statistic (e.g., rushing yards, passing yards) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the ranking belongs to */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week the ranking is for */,
  "current_rank" INTEGER /* Current ranking of the player */,
  "predicted_rank" INTEGER /* Predicted ranking of the player */,
  "actual_rank" INTEGER /* Actual ranking of the player */,
  "ranking_type" TEXT /* Type of ranking (e.g., overall, position-specific) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_rankings_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conference the team belongs to */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* ID of the division the team belongs to */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_conference_id FOREIGN KEY ("conference_id") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conferences" (
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conference */,
  "conference_name" TEXT /* Name of the conference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conference the division belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_player_watchlist" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the watchlist belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player on the watchlist */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the player was added to the watchlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_player_watchlist_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_player_watchlist_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., user, analyst, admin) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "analyst_name" TEXT /* Name of the analyst */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the analyst */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the analyst joined */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyst_player_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst who made the note */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the note is for */,
  "note" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the note was added */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_player_notes_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_player_notes_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the injury belongs to */,
  "injury" TEXT /* Description of the injury */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the injury (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the player is expected to return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the log belongs to */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Opponent in the game */,
  "rushing_yards" INTEGER /* Rushing yards in the game */,
  "passing_yards" INTEGER /* Passing yards in the game */,
  "receiving_yards" INTEGER /* Receiving yards in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
